design_philosophy: A precision-focused, data-dense command center for cybersecurity students. Emphasizes authority, clarity, and truth through a stark technical aesthetic with exposed grid structures, monospaced data points, and minimal decoration. Color is strictly functional, mapping directly to academic progress states.

layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
layout_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 for standard cards; p-12 for hero or summary sections.
layout_spacing.radius: rounded-sm (4px) to rounded-md (6px) - sharp, technical feel.

cards.style: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover adds slight border color change and -translate-y-1 lift.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-medium rounded-sm hover:bg-blue-400 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_elevated text-primary border border-border hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors

react_flow_nodes.style: Rectangular, sharp edges (rounded-sm), background: surface_elevated. Left border (4px) colored by subject status. Font mono for subject codes.
react_flow_nodes.interaction: Hover to see prerequisites highlighted. Click for details panel.

data_tables.style: Minimal borders, left-aligned text, mono font for credits and grades. High contrast header row.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders pattern. Expose the skeleton. Subtle borders on right and bottom of grid items.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used only for sticky header or floating modals: bg-[#05070A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Apply to the 'Graduation Estimator' or 'GPA Honors' card to highlight the ultimate goal.

images.description: Industrial metal mesh with geometric patterns. Used as a highly dark, textured background behind the login form with an 80% black overlay to maintain tech aesthetic.
Profile picture placeholder for the student profile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Use standard JavaScript (.js/.jsx) for all React components. Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric data (GPA, Credits, Hours).
Implement 'Grid Borders' layout for the main dashboard: apply subtle borders to cards to make the grid visible.
Use Recharts for the analytical dashboard. The charts must use the exact status colors defined in the palette (Completada=Green, Cursando=Yellow, Planificada=Blue, Pendiente=Grey).
For the React Flow pensum tree, custom nodes should be minimalist, matching the technical theme, with a color indicator for the state.
DO NOT use Inter or generic fonts for headings; stick to Outfit.
For the login page, use a split layout: left side is the dark mesh image with a deep overlay, right side is a clean, centered login form.
